statement: On creatorbench-v1, covering 24 private held-out workflow instances from 3 creator-disjoint sources across 8 workflows, NodeVideo produced a usable first-pass result automatically in 0.0%, after bounded assistance in 0.0%, and safely abstained in 50.0%. Silent failures occurred in 0.0%.
limitations: No result is classified usable until a rendered artifact is blindly reviewed by a human.
This baseline measures request ingestion, rights validation, route eligibility, and honest non-success states—not editing quality.
